sqlMap.select: SELECT openflag FROM TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO WHERE docid = #docId#
SELECT TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.href FROM TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docid WHERE TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid = #docId# AND openflag <> '3'

SELECT attachfilehref FROM TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO INNER JOIN TBL_ENDATTACHINFO ON TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.docid = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.docid AND TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.sn = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.attachfilesn WHERE TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.docid = #docId# AND TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.sn = #sn# AND fileopenflag = 'Y'
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_GOVDOCSEND (docid, attachsn, type, senddate, tenant_id, companyid) VALUES (#docId#, #attachSn#, #type#, now(), '0', #companyNum#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT MAX(sn) FROM TBL_GOVSENDDOCHISTORY) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT MAX(sn) + 1 FROM TBL_GOVSENDDOCHISTORY) END AS sn FROM DUAL
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_GOVSENDDOCHISTORY (sn, senddate, sendflag) VALUES (#sn#, SYSDATE, 'Y')
sqlMap.select: SELECT TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid, '' AS "n2", '' AS "n3", '' AS "n4", '' AS "n5", '' AS "n6", '' AS "n7", TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.doctitle, '' AS "n9", TO_CHAR(TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.createdate, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS createdate, #companyNum# AS companycode, #companyName# AS companyname, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.writerdeptid, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.writerdeptname, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.writername, '' AS "n16", TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docno, TBL_CABINETCLASS.keepingperiod, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.publicitycode, TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.basis, TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.reason, '' AS "n22", '' AS "n23", '' AS "n24", '' AS "n25", TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.listopenflag, '' AS "n27", '' AS "n28", TBL_RECORD.aprmembertitle, ( SELECT aprmemberjobtitle FROM ( SELECT TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID = TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRTYPE IN ('001', '016', '004') ORDER BY TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS aprmemberjobtitle, TO_CHAR(NVL(TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.openlimitdate, SYSDATE -1),'YYYYMMDD') AS openlimitdate, '' AS "n32", '' AS "n33", '01' AS "n34", ('본문:'||TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid||':'||TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.doctitle||SUBSTR(NVL(FORMFILELOCATION, HREF), -4)||':'||NVL(TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docsize, '60112')||':0:'||(CASE WHEN TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.openflag = '3' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END)||(CASE WHEN FILEATTACHLIST.attach IS NULL THEN '' ELSE FILEATTACHLIST.attach END) ) AS filelist FROM TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docid AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.companyid = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.companyid INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.docid AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.companyid = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.companyid INNER JOIN TBL_RECORD ON TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid = TBL_RECORD.docid AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBL_RECORD.tenant_id AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.companyid = TBL_RECORD.companyid INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.cabinetid = TBL_CABINET.cabinetid AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBL_CABINET.tenant_id AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.companyid = TBL_CABINET.companyid INNER JOIN TBL_CABINETCLASS ON TBL_CABINET.cabinetclassno = TBL_CABINETCLASS.cabinetclassno AND TBL_CABINET.tenant_id = TBL_CABINETCLASS.tenant_id AND TBL_CABINET.companyid = TBL_CABINETCLASS.companyid INNER JOIN TBL_FORMINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID = TBL_FORMINFO.FORMID AND TBL_FORMINFO.OPENGOVFLAG = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT docid, LISTAGG(attach, '') AS attach FROM (SELECT TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.docid, (':첨부:'||TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.docid||sn||':'||attachfilename||':'||NVL(attachfilesize, '1024')||':'||sn-1||':'||fileopenflag) AS attach FROM TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO INNER JOIN TBL_ENDATTACHINFO ON TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.docid = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.docid AND TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.sn = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.attachfilesn AND TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.tenant_id = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.tenant_id AND TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.companyid = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.companyid ) ATTACHLIST GROUP BY docid ) FILEATTACHLIST ON TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid = FILEATTACHLIST.docid WHERE (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docstate <> '011' OR TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docstate IS NULL) AND TO_DATE(TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.createdate) = (SYSDATE + (INTERVAL '1' DAY))
SELECT TO_CHAR(senddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM TBL_GOVSENDDOCHISTORY WHERE sendflag = 'N'

SELECT TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid, '' AS "n2", '' AS "n3", '' AS "n4", '' AS "n5", '' AS "n6", '' AS "n7", TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.doctitle, '' AS "n9", TO_CHAR(TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.createdate, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS createdate, #companyNum# AS companycode, #companyName# AS companyname, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.writerdeptid, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.writerdeptname, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.writername, '' AS "n16", TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docno, TBL_CABINETCLASS.keepingperiod, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.publicitycode, TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.basis, TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.reason, '' AS "n22", '' AS "n23", '' AS "n24", '' AS "n25", TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.listopenflag, '' AS "n27", '' AS "n28", TBL_RECORD.aprmembertitle, ( SELECT aprmemberjobtitle FROM ( SELECT TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID = TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid AND TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRTYPE IN ('001', '016', '004') ORDER BY TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS aprmemberjobtitle, TO_CHAR(NVL(TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.openlimitdate, SYSDATE -1),'YYYYMMDD') AS openlimitdate, '' AS "n32", '' AS "n33", '01' AS "n34", ('본문:'||TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid||':'||TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.doctitle||SUBSTR(NVL(FORMFILELOCATION, HREF), -4)||':'||NVL(TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docsize, '60112')||':0:'||(CASE WHEN TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.openflag = '3' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END)||(CASE WHEN FILEATTACHLIST.attach IS NULL THEN '' ELSE FILEATTACHLIST.attach END) ) AS filelist FROM TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docid AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.companyid = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.companyid INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.docid AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.companyid = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.companyid INNER JOIN TBL_RECORD ON TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid = TBL_RECORD.docid AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBL_RECORD.tenant_id AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.companyid = TBL_RECORD.companyid INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.cabinetid = TBL_CABINET.cabinetid AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBL_CABINET.tenant_id AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.companyid = TBL_CABINET.companyid INNER JOIN TBL_CABINETCLASS ON TBL_CABINET.cabinetclassno = TBL_CABINETCLASS.cabinetclassno AND TBL_CABINET.tenant_id = TBL_CABINETCLASS.tenant_id AND TBL_CABINET.companyid = TBL_CABINETCLASS.companyid INNER JOIN TBL_FORMINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID = TBL_FORMINFO.FORMID AND TBL_FORMINFO.OPENGOVFLAG = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT docid, LISTAGG(attach, '') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY attach) AS attach FROM (SELECT TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.docid, (':첨부:'||TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.docid||sn||':'||attachfilename||':'||NVL(attachfilesize, '1024')||':'||(sn-1)||':'||fileopenflag) AS attach FROM TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO INNER JOIN TBL_ENDATTACHINFO ON TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.docid = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.docid AND TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.sn = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.attachfilesn AND TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.tenant_id = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.tenant_id AND TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.companyid = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.companyid ) ATTACHLIST GROUP BY docid ) FILEATTACHLIST ON TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid = FILEATTACHLIST.docid WHERE (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docstate <> '011' OR TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docstate IS NULL) AND TO_DATE(TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.CREATEDATE) IN
#resendDate[]#
